name: qwen-image-skill
description: Generates images from text prompts using Alibaba Cloud DashScope Wan text-to-image API. Handles async task creation, polling, and result retrieval. Requires DASHSCOPE_API_KEY and DASHSCOPE_REGION env vars.
author: vanitu

env.name: DASHSCOPE_API_KEY
env.description: DashScope API key from Alibaba Cloud Model Studio console
